{{Quote|Long as this old cargo orbitter's ''clearances'' don't get checked too closely-- getting in and out shouldn't be a ''problem''.|Rebel Captain|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 30">[[Star Wars (1977) 30|''Star Wars'' (1977) 30]]</ref>}}
'''Cargo orbiters''' were small cargo [[Starship/Legends|craft]] which were not designed with [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] abilities. The design required a single [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] to be operated.

==History==
Such craft were not uncommon on [[Factory world/Legends|factory worlds]] such as [[Metalorn/Legends|Metalorn]]. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] used one such craft—modified with a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]—to smuggle [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] on and off Metalorn.

==Appearances==
